content: Remote OK CNC Machinist Milling CX2 <p><span style="font-size: 16px">CX2 is a next-generation defense technology company founded to deliver spectrum dominance for the United States and our allies. CX2âs AI-enabled hardware and software platforms detect, disrupt and defend the electromagnetic spectrum across land, air, sea and space domains.</span></p><p><br></p><p data-local-id="23fffd49717f" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true" data-pm-slice="1 1 []">CX2 is seeking an engaged, self-starting machinist who wants to own prototyping and small volume production.</p><p data-local-id="23fffd49717f" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true" data-pm-slice="1 1 []">As the first CNC Machinist, you will be a key player in building out our machining capabilities for prototypes, tools and fixtures, and small batch production of flight critical components.&nbsp; You will touch all aspects of machining from procuring machines and cutting tools, programming, tooling, to assisting with one-off components and setups while ensuring critical dimensions are met.</p><p data-local-id="23fffd49717f" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true" data-pm-slice="1 1 []">You will mentor and provide guidance to engineers, technicians and machine operators and act as an internal expert on CNC milling. As we scale the organization you will be pivotal in creating clever methods to increase production and reduce cycle times. This is a small but fast growing manufacturing team in a new facility. This role is a good fit for those who like to build, tinker, and tackle various machining tasks.</p><p data-local-id="23fffd49717f" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true" data-pm-slice="1 1 []">We are looking for a dedicated and resourceful machinist who possesses a strong foundation in aerospace manufacturing of metal components.</p><p data-local-id="5ef8b3e46a1c" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true" data-pm-slice="1 1 []">This role requires an onsite presence in our El Segundo, CA HQ; a remote work environment is not considered for this opportunity.</p>\n<p></p><p><br></p><b>Key Responsibilities</b><div><ul data-local-id="481f88b2-3015-4041-b6dd-cf2633a2b6b0" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="bulletList" data-prosemirror-node-block="true" data-pm-slice="3 3 []"><li data-local-id="1c32feed-aa50-4447-a350-d95fc5128a50" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="listItem" data-prosemirror-node-block="true"><p data-local-id="4f7f2115f230" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">Operate 3 axis CNC mills</p></li><li data-local-id="b525bc5d-8ffc-4d10-9852-010a485126a6" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="listItem" data-prosemirror-node-block="true"><p data-local-id="687deea6b283" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">Responsible for CAM and setup of CNC Mills and routers</p></li><li data-local-id="51b93343-294d-4b4b-9b71-c77a6112f123" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="listItem" data-prosemirror-node-block="true"><p data-local-id="4c38eba38215" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">Help spec and purchase new machines and tools</p></li><li data-local-id="7f0e89cd-6c30-49f2-a9a5-007ae9c668bb" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="listItem" data-prosemirror-node-block="true"><p data-local-id="f13cb1115f28" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">Interpret engineering blueprints, ensuring all components are machined to exact aerospace specifications</p></li><li data-local-id="6c79ff87-9c19-4be0-b594-fc2bbae09d5b" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="listItem" data-prosemirror-node-block="true"><p data-local-id="4e262e1407fc" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">Work with the tightest tolerances in a prototype-heavy, low-volume production environment</p></li><li data-local-id="93eddda0-0c3a-447a-aa73-7ef325ff8833" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="listItem" data-prosemirror-node-block="true"><p data-local-id="cef8a5e89fcd" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">Ability to work independently to solve machining challenges and provide feedback and process improvements to the engineering team</p></li><li data-local-id="96442839-ddf5-48de-a507-188b41ed9fd0" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="listItem" data-prosemirror-node-block="true"><p data-local-id="da94447eb382" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">Willingness to manage production data like CAM files</p></li></ul></div><p><br></p><b>Required Qualifications</b><ul><li>A minimum of 5 years of experience in CNC machining, with a strong background in prototyping and one-off production</li><li data-local-id="ecc23311-0f72-4669-abb1-8ad80ef739c0" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="listItem" data-prosemirror-node-block="true"><p data-local-id="cb91eff9a135" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">Minimum 2 years of experience with CAM software and ability to program 3 axis mills</p></li><li data-local-id="dcbea6bc-52d7-440f-bcb4-c28a25d9c148" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="listItem" data-prosemirror-node-block="true"><p data-local-id="fa8720937ac6" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="paragraph" data-prosemirror-node-block="true">Ability to program and setup jobs for CNC mills with minimal assistance</p></li><li data-local-id="aafd148d-d541-4d57-ad07-682f1fab60b3" data-prosemirror-content-type="node" data-prosemirror-node-name="listItem" data-prosemirror-no
